web.markdown:
New [Agent Skills Directory](https://mcpmarket.com/tools/skills)— Skills for Claude, ChatGPT, Codex & more

AboutSKILL.mdFAQ

The Anthropic Brand Styling skill enables Claude to automatically format artifacts with Anthropic’s signature aesthetic, ensuring a consistent and professional look-and-feel. By integrating official hex codes like Anthropic Orange and Dark charcoal alongside specific typeface guidelines for Poppins and Lora, this skill streamlines the creation of branded presentations, reports, and UI mockups. It is an essential tool for developers and content creators who need to generate high-fidelity assets that align perfectly with Anthropic’s corporate design standards and visual hierarchy.

## Key Features

010 GitHub stars

02Dynamic color selection logic to maintain optimal contrast and readability

03Smart font fallback system to Arial and Georgia to ensure cross-platform compatibility

04Official Anthropic color palette integration including signature Orange, Blue, and Green accents

05Automated typography application using Poppins for headings and Lora for body text

06Consistent visual hierarchy for multi-level headings and structural elements

## Use Cases

01Standardizing documentation and project artifacts with a consistent visual style

02Styling PowerPoint presentations or PDF reports to match Anthropic’s corporate identity

03Generating high-fidelity UI mockups or design prototypes with brand-accurate colors

Skills ذات الصلة

سجل الإصدارات

[هل تحتاج مساعدة؟](https://discord.gg/AYFPHvv2jT) [عرض الشيفرة المصدرية](https://github.com/ihlamury/design-skills/tree/main/skills/anthropic) [الإبلاغ عن مشكلة](https://github.com/ihlamury/design-skills/issues)

## الملخص

Provides an opinionated, implementation-ready UI guideline for building Anthropic-style light-mode interfaces. Key features include a fixed 4px layout grid, Inter as the single font family, and strict typography rules (primary heading 68px/700, body 33px/semi\_bold, use of text-balance for headings and text-pretty for body). A constrained color system enforces a page background of #ECE9E0, a palette limit of eight colors, and a semantic token set for surfaces, overlays, and text (e.g., surface-base, surface-raised, surface-overlay, text-primary). Accessibility is enforced with a minimum 4.5:1 text contrast ratio. Additional rules cover numeric rendering (tabular-nums), reduced font-weight variety, and prohibitions on letter-spacing changes. Use this Skill when building Anthropic-inspired design systems, web apps, components (cards, modals, tooltips), and accessible, consistent UI libraries to accelerate development and maintain visual fidelity.

SKILL.md

# Anthropic UI Skills

Opinionated constraints for building Anthropic-style interfaces with AI agents.

## When to Apply [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#when-to-apply)

Reference these guidelines when:

- Building light-mode interfaces
- Creating Anthropic-inspired design systems
- Implementing UIs with Inter font and 4px grid

## Colors [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#colors)

- SHOULD use light backgrounds for primary surfaces
- MUST use `#ECE9E0` as page background (`surface-base`)
- SHOULD limit color palette to 8 distinct colors
- MUST maintain text contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for accessibility

### Semantic Tokens [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#semantic-tokens)

| Token | HEX | RGB | Usage |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `surface-base` | #ECE9E0 | rgb(236,233,224) | Page background |
| `surface-raised` | #DBD1C0 | rgb(219,209,192) | Cards, modals, raised surfaces |
| `surface-overlay` | #0F0F10 | rgb(15,15,16) | Overlays, tooltips, dropdowns |
| `text-primary` | #625F59 | rgb(98,95,89) | Headings, body text |
| `text-secondary` | #9F9F9C | rgb(159,159,156) | Secondary, muted text |
| `text-tertiary` | [#454036](https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub/issues/454036) | rgb(69,64,54) | Additional text |

## Typography [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#typography)

- MUST use `Inter` as primary font family
- SHOULD use single font family for consistency
- MUST use `68px` / `700` for primary headings
- MUST use `33px` / `semi_bold` for body text
- SHOULD reduce font weights (currently 5 detected)
- MUST use `text-balance` for headings and `text-pretty` for body text
- SHOULD use `tabular-nums` for numeric data
- NEVER modify letter-spacing unless explicitly requested

### Text Styles [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#text-styles)

| Style | Font | Size | Weight | Color | Count |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `heading-1` | Inter | 68px | 700 | #201F1D | 1 |
| `body` | Inter | 33px | semi\_bold | #35312A | 1 |
| `text-23px` | Inter | 23px | 500 | #403D37 | 1 |
| `text-21px` | Inter | 21px | 400 | #3D362C | 1 |
| `text-21px` | Inter | 21px | 400 | #3B352B | 1 |
| `text-20px` | Inter | 20px | 400 | [#494237](https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub/issues/494237) | 1 |
| `text-17px` | Inter | 17px | 500 | #423F3B | 1 |
| `text-16px` | Inter | 16px | 400 | [#454036](https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub/issues/454036) | 1 |
| `text-14px` | Inter | 14px | 500 | #3F3931 | 1 |
| `text-14px` | Inter | 14px | 400 | #A2A3A0 | 1 |

### Typography Reference [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#typography-reference)

**Font Families:**

- `Inter` (used 16x)

**Font Sizes:** 10px, 11px, 14px, 16px, 17px, 20px, 21px, 23px, 33px, 68px

## Spacing [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#spacing)

- MUST use 4px grid for spacing
- SHOULD use spacing from scale: 3px, 4px, 5px, 6px
- SHOULD use 5px as default gap between elements
- NEVER use arbitrary spacing values (use design scale)
- SHOULD maintain consistent padding within containers

## Borders [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#borders)

- MUST use border-radius from scale: 3px, 15px
- SHOULD use 3px as default border-radius
- NEVER use arbitrary border-radius values (use design scale)
- SHOULD use subtle borders (1px) for element separation

### Border Radius Reference [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#border-radius-reference)

**Scale:** 3px, 15px

## Layout [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#layout)

- MUST design for 1920px base viewport width
- SHOULD use consistent element widths: 10px, 18px, 146px, 579px
- SHOULD maintain text-heavy layout with clear hierarchy
- NEVER use `h-screen`, use `h-dvh` for full viewport height
- MUST respect `safe-area-inset` for fixed elements
- SHOULD use `size-*` for square elements instead of `w-*` \+ `h-*`

### Detected Layout Patterns [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#detected-layout-patterns)

- **Main Content**: width: 1920px, height: 1004px
- **Main Content**: width: 1920px, height: 673px

## Components [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#components)

- MUST use `0px` height for input fields

### Buttons [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#buttons)

| Variant | Background | Text | Border | Height | Radius |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Ghost | transparent | #9F9F9C | none | - | - |

### Inputs [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#inputs)

- Height: `0px`

## Interactive States [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#interactive-states)

### Focus [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#focus)

- MUST use `2px` outline with accent color (`#5E6AD2`)
- MUST use `2px` outline-offset
- NEVER remove focus indicators

### Hover [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#hover)

- Buttons (primary): lighten background by 10%
- Buttons (secondary): use `#DBD1C0` background
- List items: use `#DBD1C0` background

### Disabled [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#disabled)

- MUST use `opacity: 0.5`
- MUST use `cursor: not-allowed`

## Interaction [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#interaction)

- MUST use an `AlertDialog` for destructive or irreversible actions
- SHOULD use structural skeletons for loading states
- MUST show errors next to where the action happens
- NEVER block paste in `input` or `textarea` elements
- MUST add an `aria-label` to icon-only buttons

## Animation [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#animation)

- NEVER add animation unless it is explicitly requested
- MUST animate only compositor props (`transform`, `opacity`)
- NEVER animate layout properties (`width`, `height`, `top`, `left`, `margin`, `padding`)
- SHOULD use `ease-out` on entrance animations
- NEVER exceed `200ms` for interaction feedback
- SHOULD respect `prefers-reduced-motion`

## Performance [Permalink for this section](https://lobehub.com/ar/skills/ihlamury-design-skills-anthropic\#performance)

- NEVER animate large `blur()` or `backdrop-filter` surfaces
- NEVER apply `will-change` outside an active animation
- NEVER use `useEffect` for anything that can be expressed as render logic
